ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip on file. Wyndon is a Galar location, not a character.

trivia_bullets.text: Wyndon Stadium is the largest stadium in Galar and the site of the Champion Cup, the single-elimination tournament that determines who challenges Champion Leon. The stadium's design is inspired by Wembley Stadium, including the iconic Wembley Arch. Wyndon is distinct from Hammerlocke: Hammerlocke is where Rose Tower (Macro Cosmos HQ) is located; Wyndon is where the stadium itself sits. [Bulbapedia: Wyndon Stadium, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Bulbapedia: Wyndon Stadium, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: The Stadium card's effect — heal 100 damage from any Pokemon VMAX when it evolves from a Pokemon V — is thematically coherent: in the games, Dynamaxing (the in-game equivalent of the VMAX mechanic) happens inside stadiums under Galar Particle energy. The card encodes the stadium's structural role in enabling Max-form battle. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh4-161 oracle text]

Wyndon Stadium is the only Stadium card in Vivid Voltage that pairs mechanically with a Supporter card in the same set: League Staff (VIV-153) draws 2 extra cards if Wyndon Stadium is in play. Within-set mechanical pairing of a venue and its workforce at adjacent collector numbers (153, 161) is a Pokemon TCG designer signature, paralleling the Rose (DAA-168) + Rose Tower (DAA-169) pair from Darkness Ablaze. [PokemonTCG.io: swsh4-161, swsh4-153 oracle texts]
